creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
This PR upgrades the following ports:
- www/horde-devel: from 2.0 RC2 to RC3;
- mail/turba: from 1.0 RC2 to RC3;
- mail/imp-devel: from 3.0 RC2 to RC3 (but it has never been committed).

This PR supersedes the PR ports/32479, ports/32090 and ports/32153.

The three final releases are expected for the end of the year.

Fix: uudecode and untar the following file, then apply the patches and run
the shar file.

How-To-Repeat: 	Enclosed is an uuencoded tar.gz file; it contains two patches
for www/horde-devel and mail/turba, and a complete shar file for mail/imp-devel.
